paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as discussions of the company's governance and a recent convertible notes deal. A director designee, Miles Everson, resigned citing governance concerns, and the company completed a $375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes due 2031.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings. A recent social post mentioned the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
